'''âb-g-w-z''' ('''kabagwezoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vagrantize|vagrantize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-g-w-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vagrantize|vagrantize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âb-g-w-z
|-
! Lemma
| kabagwezoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibagwezoko|thibagwezoko]] || [[word:jibagwezoko|jibagwezoko]] || [[word:shibagwezoko|shibagwezoko]] || [[word:kibagwezoko|kibagwezoko]]
|-

|-
